children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary of Homeland Security shall deposit all interest described in subsection (c) into the special account established under (repealed by subtitle F of title VII of the Deficit Reduction Act of 2005 (; )) for inclusion in distributions described in subsection (b) made on or after .section 1675c(e) of this titlePublic Law 109–171120 Stat. 154February 24, 2016
were made on or before ; andSeptember 30, 2007

were, in accordance with section 822 of the Claims Resolution Act of 2010 ( note), unliquidated, not in litigation, and not under an order of liquidation from the Department of Commerce on .19 U.S.C. 1675cDecember 8, 2010

children.label: A
children.text: a customs bond pursuant to a court order or judgment; or

children.label: B
children.text: a settlement with respect to a customs bond, including any payment made to U.S. Customs and Border Protection with respect to that bond by a surety.

children.label: A
children.text: Interest accrued under .section 1677g of this title

children.label: B
children.text: Interest accrued under .section 1505(d) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: Equitable interest under common law and interest under awarded by a court against a surety under its bond for late payment of antidumping duties, countervailing duties, or interest described in subparagraph (A) or (B).section 580 of this title

children.heading: Antidumping duties
children.label: 1 Antidumping duties
children.text: The term “antidumping duties” means antidumping duties imposed under or under the Antidumping Act, 1921 (title II of the Act of ; , chapter 14).section 1673 of this title42 Stat. 11May 27, 1921

children.heading: Countervailing duties
children.label: 2 Countervailing duties
children.text: The term “countervailing duties” means countervailing duties imposed under .section 1671 of this title
